description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage containing a pages job. The pages job runs in the deploy stage and executes the exact shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public; it publishes the public/ directory as an artifact (paths: public) and is restricted to the master branch via an only rule. The job uses the default Docker image (no custom image) and deploys the artifact to GitLab Pages.
